title: Find the Most Competitive Subsequence
titleCn: 找出最具竞争力的子序列

testcases.input: nums = [3,5,2,6], k = 2 Output: [2,6] Explanation: Among the set of every possible subsequence: {[3,5], [3,2], [3,6], [5,2], [5,6], [2,6]}, [2,6] is the most competitive.
testcases.expectedOutput: [2,6] Explanation: Among the set of every possible subsequence: {[3,5], [3,2], [3,6], [5,2], [5,6], [2,6]}, [2,6] is the most competitive.
